changes.issue: missing outer .shift(1) — leaky, correlated with label by construction

derived_features_updated: return_skewness_30 — now uses canonical log_return_1 via features_df parameter
return_percentile_100 — now uses canonical log_return_1 via features_df parameter
btc_sol_corr_50 — now uses canonical log_return_1 via features_df parameter
boruta_impact: log_return_1 and log_return_3 were in the previously confirmed 6-feature set. Their importance scores are likely inflated by leakage. The next Boruta run is expected to produce materially different results.
realized_vol_note: realized_vol_{12,50,200} also use log_return_1 as input. The shift propagates correctly since realized_vol is a rolling std of log_return_1 — the std of shifted returns equals the std of the original returns shifted by 1.
